form.formComment: Gelding by Star Turn on debut. Ran 3rd in a trial at Warwick Farm over 816m on March 30. Has shown ability in all four trials and maps to get the gun run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Star Turn on debut. Ran 3rd in a trial at Warwick Farm over 816m on March 30. Has shown ability in all four trials and maps to get the gun run.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At debut, 6th of 10 at Kembla Grange Super Mdn on March 21 over 1200m, slow going 6 len behind Spanish Artist carrying 57kg at $7.50. Second-up led but faded 2nd of 7 at Moruya Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 1010m, on a slow track; 2.25 len behind Hunter One carrying 58.5kg at $2. Has slim place prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Raced twice to date. At debut, 6th of 10 at Kembla Grange Super Mdn on March 21 over 1200m, slow going 6 len behind Spanish Artist carrying 57kg at $7.50. Second-up led but faded 2nd of 7 at Moruya Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 1010m, on a slow track; 2.25 len behind Hunter One carrying 58.5kg at $2. Has slim place prospects.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after seven months tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at Hawkesbury Cg&E Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, slow going 2.25 len behind Poisonous carrying 57.5kg at $3. Previously second-up 5th of 7 at Hawkesbury Super 3yo Mdn on September 6 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Fierce carrying 59kg at $1.70. Plenty of improvement to come in a weaker contest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(1). Second run back. First-up after seven months tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at Hawkesbury Cg&E Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, slow going 2.25 len behind Poisonous carrying 57.5kg at $3. Previously second-up 5th of 7 at Hawkesbury Super 3yo Mdn on September 6 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Fierce carrying 59kg at $1.70. Plenty of improvement to come in a weaker contest.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when raced behind the speed prior to fading second last of 9 at Hawkesbury Super Mdn on October 9 over 1000m, 9 len behind Taxation carrying 56kg at $3.80. Back for her second prep and has trialled well

Back for her second prep and has trialled well

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after eight months ran last in a small field at Beaumont (Newcastle) Cge Mdn-Sw on March 23 over 1150m, slow going 5 len behind Newy with 58.5kg at $9. Previously second-up 6th of 8 at Kembla Grange Mdn-Sw on August 7 over 1200m, on heavy track; 2.5 len behind Barbarossa carrying 56.5kg at $26. No easier this time and happy to leave out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Second run back. First-up after eight months ran last in a small field at Beaumont (Newcastle) Cge Mdn-Sw on March 23 over 1150m, slow going 5 len behind Newy with 58.5kg at $9. Previously second-up 6th of 8 at Kembla Grange Mdn-Sw on August 7 over 1200m, on heavy track; 2.5 len behind Barbarossa carrying 56.5kg at $26. No easier this time and happy to leave out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 600m steadied after improving onto the heels of Gladstone Grande.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Had two starts to date. When well in the market at debut, held ground to the line 2nd of 10 at Hawkesbury Prov Mdn-Sw on March 7 over 1100m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Blue Suede Hooves carrying 56.5kg at $1.85. Second-up raced behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 8 at this track Super 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1000m, on a slow track; 14 len behind Sir Les carrying 55.5kg at $7. Assess on her good debut placing, improver.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Had two starts to date. Second-up raced behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 8 at this track Super 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1000m, on a slow track; 14 len behind Sir Les carrying 55.5kg at $7. Assess on her good debut placing, improver.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping, made contact with Frosty Bangers.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resumes from a spell. Not seen since she finished last of 9 at Gosford Super Mdn December 31 over 1200m, 9 len behind Fuadee with 53.5kg at $7.50. On debut second last of 7 at Rosehill F&M Mdn-Sw November 12 over 1200m, 5 len behind Plaintiff with 58kg at $6.50. Will take great benefit from this run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Resumes from a spell. Not seen since she finished last of 9 at Gosford Super Mdn December 31 over 1200m, 9 len behind Fuadee with 53.5kg at $7.50. On debut second last of 7 at Rosehill F&M Mdn-Sw November 12 over 1200m, 5 len behind Plaintiff with 58kg at $6.50. Will take great benefit from this run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resuming after a three-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at Gosford Super Mdn-Sw January 9 over 1100m, 2.25 len behind Sacrosanct carrying 55.5kg at $14. On debut fourth of 7 at this track 3yo+ Mdn November 26 over 1000m, 0.7 len behind Harry The Thief carrying 55kg at $21. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Ticks a few boxes first-up from the low draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Dual acceptor. Resuming after a three-and-a-half months break. On debut fourth of 7 at this track 3yo+ Mdn November 26 over 1000m, 0.7 len behind Harry The Thief carrying 55kg at $21. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Ticks a few boxes first-up from the low draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping bumped by Harry The Thief.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after two months 3rd of 9 at Muswellbrook Mdn-Sw on April 6 over 900m, on a slow track; 0.6 len behind Bifurcation carrying 56kg at $4.80. Previously second-up ran last of 8 at Randwick 2yo Mdn on January 3 over 1000m, slow going 9 len behind Knightsbridge carrying 57kg at $101. Keep safe against the older horses.
